sections.paragraph:
- Original: πορθέω

- Transliteration: Portheo

- Phonetic: por-theh'-o

- Definition:

1. to destroy, overthrow

- Origin: prolongation from pertho (to sack)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Prolonged version of πέρθω porthō (to sack); to ravage (figuratively): - destroy waste.
